title: Legal, Commercial and Finance Lead
excerpt: Build and maintain Orbint’s contractual, commercial, and financial backbone, supporting space and defence projects through structured contract management, financial oversight, procurement coordination, and operational excellence.
body:
Your Role

As a Legal, Commercial and Finance Lead, you will be responsible for building and maintaining Orbint’s contractual, commercial, financial, and documentation backbone. You will support customer, supplier, research, and partner relationships by preparing, reviewing, coordinating, and tracking contracts, NDAs, purchase orders, subcontractor agreements, invoices, budgets, funding documents, and commercial project records.

Your role is central to turning complex legal, commercial, and financial information into a structured, traceable, and decision-ready operating system for Orbint’s space and defence activities.

You will work at the intersection of legal operations, commercial management, finance, and strategic business support:

  • Prepare, review, coordinate, and maintain customer, supplier, partner, research, and subcontractor agreements.
  • Manage contract administration activities including obligations tracking, milestones, deliverables, deadlines, amendments, and commercial records.
  • Support procurement processes, purchase orders, supplier coordination, and subcontractor management.
  • Maintain finance trackers covering budgets, actual costs, forecasts, liquidity planning, commitments, open invoices, and upcoming payment obligations.
  • Coordinate invoice processing, payment tracking, financial documentation, and commercial reporting activities.
  • Support management, accountants, tax advisors, auditors, lawyers, and external partners with structured documentation and financial follow-up.
  • Assist with grant documentation, funding applications, public project administration, audit preparation, and compliance reporting.
  • Develop and maintain structured filing systems, documentation standards, and commercial processes that enable efficient scaling of the company.
  • Identify, document, and escalate legal, commercial, contractual, tax, IP, confidentiality, liability, procurement, compliance, and financial risks.
  • Work closely with management and engineering teams to ensure contractual and commercial requirements are translated into practical operational processes.

About You

We do not expect a perfect match to every bullet point, but you should recognize yourself in most of the profile below.

Core Legal, Commercial & Finance Profile

  • Degree in Business Law, Law, Business Administration, Finance, Tax, Accounting, Controlling, Economics, or a related field.
  • Experience in contract administration, legal operations, procurement, accounting, controlling, audit preparation, grant documentation, or commercial project management.
  • Strong understanding of contracts, obligations, deadlines, payment terms, budgets, invoices, cost documentation, and commercial risks.
  • Experience maintaining financial records, budget trackers, forecasts, cost reporting, and commercial project documentation.
  • Ability to coordinate effectively with management, accountants, auditors, tax advisors, lawyers, suppliers, customers, and public project partners.
  • Confident with Microsoft Office tools, especially Word and Excel, and comfortable working with structured file systems and documentation processes.
  • Ideally familiar with accounting, contract management, ERP, project management, or procurement software tools.
  • Ability to identify and escalate legal, contractual, financial, compliance, tax, IP, confidentiality, liability, and procurement-related risks.
  • Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple parallel workstreams and deadlines.
  • Comfortable working in dynamic environments where processes are being built and improved continuously.

Space / Defence / Technology Domain

  • Prior experience or strong interest in space, aerospace, defence, security, research, engineering, or high-technology environments.
  • Experience supporting research projects, public funding programs, technology development projects, or regulated industries is a strong plus.
  • Understanding of documentation, compliance, and reporting requirements associated with public-sector, defence, or research customers is beneficial.

General

  • Structured, analytical working style with strong ownership and very high reliability.
  • Ability to bring order into complex, incomplete, or fast-moving documentation and commercial processes.
  • Strong communication skills and the ability to coordinate clearly with management, engineers, suppliers, customers, accountants, lawyers, and public project partners.
  • High attention to detail and a strong sense for confidentiality, deadlines, and documentation quality.
  • Ability to translate complex legal, commercial, and financial information into actionable insights and practical business decisions.
  • Ability to take ownership of processes and continuously improve the company’s operational foundations.
  • Very good command of English and German (spoken and written).
  • Eligibility for security clearance.

Why Orbint

At Orbint, you will be joining an ambitious team where your work directly supports a new space-based SIGINT capability for European defence and security. You will help build the contractual, commercial, and financial foundation that enables our engineering teams to develop advanced RF payloads, satellites, onboard software, and ground systems for real operational users.

Your work will create the operational framework that allows Orbint to scale from ambitious concepts to deployable space systems, ensuring that contracts, funding, procurement, compliance, and financial management support the successful delivery of next-generation space-based sensing capabilities.

How to Apply

Please send the following to [info@orbint.de](mailto:info@orbint.de):

  • CV
  • A brief motivation letter explaining how you became aware of Orbint, why working on space-based SIGINT for defence and security users is motivating for you, and how your previous experience would strengthen the Orbint team.
  • References to prior relevant work (e.g. contract administration, finance tracking, grant documentation, audit preparation, procurement, legal operations, commercial project management, or related activities), if permissible.
  • Your earliest possible starting date and your salary expectations.
